---
title: "Pranav Kolluri"
---

![Pranav Kolluri](images/pjk_headshot.jpg){.profile-photo}

::: {.hero-text}
I'm a first-year Biomedical Engineering PhD student at OHSU, working in Dr. Xubo Song's lab on multimodal single-cell data integration and representation learning.

This site collects work from BMI 525: Data Visualization for Biomedical Informatics. The [Labs](lab-moma.qmd) section features selected visualizations from the course. The [Final Visualization](final.qmd) page covers an interactive exploration of NASA Curiosity rover weather data from Gale Crater.
:::
